Response 222520651

Launched Statewide Professional Development Initiative Supported by $1 Million in State

Community Engagement (CE) - source indicates reciprocal or jointly beneficial collaboration.

Activity Basics

Question

Activity Description (Short)

ASU and the Arizona Department of Administration launched a statewide professional development initiative supported by $1 million in state funding to strengthen Arizona’s public-sector workforce. The pilot generated more than 1,300 applications across 60 state agencies, enrolling over 700 employe...

Question

Start Date

2025-07-01 (inferred from FY26 survey window)

End Date

2026-06-30 (inferred from FY26 survey window)
